title: richardia lomensis
intro: Richardia lomensis, also known as Hawaiian creepingoxalis or creeping clover, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The medicinal properties of Richardia lomensis are primarily attributed to its leaves, which have been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for various purposes. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and possibly lower blood sugar levels. Richardia lomensis can be prepared as a tea, poultice, or infusion for its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
